productName: Stars & Rosin - Rainbow Belts x Purple Push Pop Rosin - .5g
description: Ready-to-spark hybrid infused pre-roll of Rainbow Belts, enhanced with concentrate for smoother, slower burning and a serious step up in strength. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — with notes of tropical, tree fruit, and apricot, delivering a smooth, well-rounded vibe. Pace yourself.
